title: stelis multiflora
intro: Stelis multiflora, also known as the many-flowered orchid, is a species of orchid that belongs to the genus Stelis, characterized by its numerous small flowers and slender stems. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it effective against infections and skin irritations. The health benefits of Stelis multiflora include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. Stelis multiflora is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it is also used in herbal preparations such as tinctures and salves to treat various health issues.
